name: Hokkaido Game
short_description: This is a physics puzzle game in which you build Hokkaido by piling up prefectures of Japan. You become a "big person" and drop prefectures into a box. Connected same prefectures will evolve into a larger prefecture! Create the largest prefecture in Japan, Hokkaido, before the box overflows!
detailed_description:
Let's stack up the prefectures of Japan to create Hokkaido!

This is a physics-based falling block puzzle game.
You are a "big person" and drop prefectures into a box.
If the same prefectures are attached to each other, they will evolve into bigger prefectures!
The game is completed when you create the largest prefecture, Hokkaido, before the box overflows!

Survivor Mode

In ver. 2.0, we have added a completely new game called “Survivor Mode,” which is a combination of the that game and Rogue Lite.

In this mode, you select a prefecture for evolution.

The selected prefectures have different effects, such as a narrower field, different bouncing strength, spinning while falling, and UFOs appearing... it makes a different gameplay each time.

Revive the Japanese Islands!

Prefectures created in Survivor mode will be added to the map.

Create all prefectures and revive the Japanese Islands!

About Secondary Use

To post or stream images and videos using the play screen and audio are fully allowed.

Please feel free to use them.

supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*
*languages with full audio support
